name: pr:missing-issue
description: PR has no linked open issue (#N / Closes #N)

name: pr:issue-closed
description: Linked issue is closed or missing — reopen or retarget

name: pr:ui-scope
description: Unrelated or out-of-scope UI changes vs linked issue

name: pr:needs-screenshot
description: UI PR needs screenshot / before-after in body

name: pr:protected-paths
description: Touches workflows, lockfiles, or app config

name: pr:oversized
description: PR too large — split into focused slices

name: pr:large
description: PR getting large — prefer smaller diffs

name: pr:too-many-open
description: Author has more than 2 open PRs

name: pr:needs-tests
description: Source changed without tests in the diff

name: pr:ready
description: Author marks ready for maintainer review
